description: Strategic Risk Radar for 2026 covering the UAE Non-Financial Sector — key risk areas, trends, and mitigation priorities.

description: Why the Black Swan narrative is dead — and how to identify and respond to highly probable, high-impact risks hiding in plain sight.

description: The hidden danger of scaling a business on gut instinct alone — when founder intuition becomes a liability and systems must take over.

description: Level up your forensic investigation capabilities — the five essential tools every elite investigator needs to master this year.

title: Quality Assurance & Improvement Programme (QAIP) 2025
description: The Quality Operating System for internal audit functions — implementing IIA standards for continuous quality monitoring and improvement.

description: 4 Excel tests to catch fraudsters — a rapid-deployment toolkit for efficiently surfacing financial irregularities. By Majid Mumtaz.

title: Fraud Detection & Forensics: A Strategic Framework
description: A strategic framework for fraud risk mitigation — covering detection methodologies, forensic analysis, and internal audit strategy. By Majid Mumtaz.

title: Forensic Investigation & Intelligence Report Template (Editable Word)
description: A comprehensive, board-ready forensic reporting framework in editable Word format. Includes Executive Scorecard, Benford's Law analysis, Fraud Diamond psychological profiling, and AI-driven remediation strategy.

title: The Fintech Risk Stack: 8 Product Risks Most Frameworks Underestimate
description: A 10-slide visual intelligence carousel covering model risk, embedded finance risk amplification, regulatory fragmentation, concentration risk, operational resilience gaps, and compound risk interactions across fintech product lines.

title: IPO Readiness Internal Audit Checklist (SOX 404 / ICFR)
description: Six-phase checklist for GCC pre-listing governance: independence structure, ICFR scoping, IT General Controls, testing and evidence, external auditor coordination, and GCC-specific regulatory requirements. Derived from zero-material-weakness SOX 404 implementation at a hyper-growth cloud kitchen operator.

title: Internal Audit Function Setup Checklist
description: Seven-phase checklist for building an IA function from zero: charter and independence, Audit Committee relationship, risk-based planning, methodology, team capability, performance measurement, and GCC context. Covers reporting line structure, IIA Standards compliance, and QAIP requirements.

title: Vendor Billing Fraud Detection Checklist (F&B / Aggregator)
description: Six-section fraud detection checklist for third-party and aggregator billing: contract vs. actuals review, volume reconciliation, settlement timing, three-way matching controls, aggregator platform-specific tests, and data analytics tests. Derived from AED 7.7M fraud recovery at a GCC cloud kitchen operator.

title: Audit Committee Pack Quality Checklist
description: Six-section checklist covering what separates a board-grade audit pack from a status update: executive summary standards, findings presentation, risk universe coverage, follow-up tracking, independence disclosures, and board communication quality. Developed from direct Audit Committee reporting experience across GCC JSC and pre-IPO entities.

title: GCC ERM Implementation Checklist (COSO Framework)
description: Seven-component COSO ERM checklist adapted for GCC regulatory context: governance and culture, strategy and objective-setting, risk identification, risk response, control activities, information and communication, and GCC-specific alignment including Saudi CMA, UAE SCA, Shari'ah compliance, and Vision 2030 considerations.

title: The Assumption Every AI Governance Framework Makes — and Why It Fails in GCC
description: White paper on why NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and UAE AI Policy Framework fail in GCC institutions. Three structural realities: informal authority concentration, board analytical capacity gap, and regulatory fragmentation — and the specific accountability reallocation each requires.

title: Risk Appetite Policy Template (IPO Readiness Framework)
description: A comprehensive, board-grade Risk Appetite Policy template designed for high-growth sectors and companies targeting IPO. Covers strategic, operational, food safety, brand, regulatory, financial, and technology risks with quantifiable thresholds and industry benchmarks.

title: PCI DSS Applicability Review Template
description: A strategic assessment framework for PCI DSS compliance in multi-channel food-tech environments. Outlines technical and operational controls, Cardholder Data Environment (CDE) scoping, encryption standards, and vulnerability management.

title: UAE Operations Evaluation Template
description: Comprehensive internal control assessment framework for scaling GCC logistics and kitchen fulfillment centers. Evaluates real-time inventory reconciliation, high-velocity fulfillment accuracy, and operational risk mitigation.
